name: Mobile Native
description: A profile for mobile app flows that need platform awareness, touch ergonomics, readable state design, and real task completion.
licenseNotes: Use platform guidelines and product patterns as research. Do not copy app screens or proprietary flows.
principles: Design for thumb reach, scan speed, state clarity, and interruption recovery.
A mobile surface should not feel like a squeezed desktop page.
Platform conventions matter: navigation, inputs, sheet behavior, and feedback should feel expected.
positiveExamples: Task-first mobile screens with obvious hierarchy.
Stateful controls with loading, empty, error, focus, pressed, and success behavior.
antiPatterns: Desktop dashboards squeezed into phone width.
Marketing cards masquerading as app UI.
typographyRules: Use readable body sizes and avoid dense multi-column mobile layouts.
layoutRules: Single-column default, strong section chunking, stable controls, no horizontal overflow.
componentRules: Controls need at least 44px target size and visible pressed/focus states.
copyRules: Use task language and reduce ornamental copy.
screenshotNotes: Mobile screenshots are mandatory evidence for this profile.
